description: Variables the agent walks the owner through on first admin chat. The agent collects answers then calls apply_template_variables to substitute them across files_to_substitute. Mark complete by overwriting this file with { completed: true, completed_at: ... }.

variables.prompt: What do you sell? Short description (e.g. 'handmade leather bags', 'kids clothing', 'organic skincare')
Country or city you operate in (e.g. 'UAE', 'Brooklyn')
Currency code (3 letters: AED, USD, EUR, GBP...)
How do you deliver? (e.g. 'Shipping and in-store pickup', 'Local delivery only', 'Pickup only')
Closing line in the agent's voice (e.g. 'Thanks for shopping with us!')
